workspace.name: Kupendwa Ministries
workspace.story: Kupendwa Ministries supports expectant mothers and vulnerable babies in Uganda through safe maternity homes, mentorship, and gospel-centered community outreach.

projects.title: Maternity Homes
projects.description: Safe housing, prenatal care, and discipleship for expectant mothers.

projects.title: Skills Training
projects.description: Vocational and business classes equipping mothers for independence.

projects.title: Baby Rescue & Medical Care
projects.description: Emergency medical interventions for high-risk pregnancies and newborns.

recipients_category.name: Mothers & Babies
recipients_category.description: Expectant mothers and babies receiving comprehensive care.

recipients.needs: Prenatal care and emergency delivery fund.
recipients.story: Grace is in her third trimester and enrolled in the maternity home for safe delivery due to complications.
Baby Isaiah was born prematurely and requires specialized follow-up care.

news.title: Banquet for Babies Launches
news.excerpt: Annual fundraising banquet announced for supporters.
news.body: Kupendwa Ministries opened registration for the Banquet for Babies, highlighting testimonies from mothers whose lives were transformed.

pdfs.description: Overview brochure shared with banquet attendees.
